creator: karlthane@gmail.com
text: Tried to installl new RC to my testbed machine. This is a T440p with and i5-4300M with 16GB RAM and 1TB Samsung 860 EVO. I also have an Lenovo Ultra Dock. With 12.2-RELEASE the usb stick boots no problem while laptop is attached to docking station. With 13.0-RC{1,2} it kernel panics on boot. Testing without being attached to dock allowed me to boot and install. It ran fine being docked, after being booted. Rebooting installed system while attached to docking station resulted in kernel panic once again.  Attached is picture I took of the initial kernel panics.
